description: Hot Aisle provides on-demand AMD GPU and bare-metal compute infrastructure. Its public site describes provisioning virtual machines and servers for AI and high-performance computing workloads.
summary: Hot Aisle exposes one authenticated HTTP API for managing users, teams, API keys, bare metal servers, and virtual machines at `https://admin.hotaisle.app/api/`, documented via Swagger UI; no GraphQL or MCP surface was found for this domain.
